name: ide_assistant
description: Natural-language neuro editor. Takes a user request + optional target neuro, uses inference + dev_pipeline to validate and safely apply the change.

inputs.name: target_neuro
inputs.description: specific neuro to edit; omit for new-creation

outputs.name: reply
outputs.description: assistant's summary of what it did

summary_md: The self-modification entry point. User types 'change advisor tone to terse' → assistant fetches current state → proposes new conf+code → validates → retries on error (up to max_retries) → atomically saves via dev_pipeline. Snapshot available for rollback if bad.
